scenario: Create an organization with a valid name and verify it appears in the organization list.
Update an organization's name and description and verify the changes persist after refresh.
Attempt to delete an organization with no employees and verify it succeeds; attempt to delete one with employees and verify it is blocked with an error.
Create employees in an organization and verify the headcount column updates correctly.
Create an employee with valid required fields and verify the employee appears in the table and API response.
Edit an employee's role, type, manager, location, and capacity and verify all updated values persist.
Delete an employee with assignments and direct reports and verify assignments are removed and direct reports become unassigned.
Create or update an employee with an organization assignment and verify the organization is shown in the employee list.
Create one employee as IC and another as L and verify each type is stored and displayed correctly.
Attempt to assign an IC as a manager and verify the request is rejected; assign a leader as manager and verify success.
Create or update a leader without a manager and verify the operation succeeds.
Attempt to create or update an IC without a manager and verify validation rejects it.
Attempt to set an employee as their own manager and verify validation rejects it.
Create a manager chain, then attempt to introduce a cycle and verify validation rejects it.
Create a leader with direct reports, then attempt to change that leader to IC and verify validation rejects it until reports are reassigned.
Verify employee table columns display type, organization, manager, location, and capacity after create and edit flows.
Create employees across multiple organizations, filter by organization, and verify only matching rows are shown.
Create a project with valid fields and verify it appears in the projects table and API response.
Edit a project's name, description, and dates and verify the values persist after refresh.
Delete a project with assignments and verify both the project and its related assignments are removed.
Attempt to create or update a project with end date before start date and verify validation rejects it.
Create an assignment linking an employee and project with valid dates and allocation and verify it appears in assignment views.
Edit an assignment's dates, allocation, and notes and verify the changes persist.
Delete an assignment and verify it disappears from tables, charts, and canvas views.
Attempt to create or update an assignment with end date before start date and verify validation rejects it.
Attempt to create assignments with allocation 0, negative, and greater than 100% and verify validation rejects them.
Verify the assignment table shows employee, project, dates, allocation, and notes for saved assignments.
Export assignments to CSV and verify the downloaded file contains expected headers and assignment rows.
Select an employee in the quick timeline panel and verify their scheduled projects and allocation windows are displayed.
Select a project in the quick timeline panel and verify assigned employees and their date ranges are displayed.
Create assignments and verify the relationship graph renders employees, projects, and connecting lines.
Switch allocation chart presets and custom date ranges and verify the chart updates without errors.
Create an overallocation scenario and verify the watchdog chart highlights utilization above 100%.
Open the canvas page and verify projects and resource sidebar render successfully.
Create a manager with direct reports and verify the resource list groups reports beneath that manager.
Expand and collapse a manager node in the canvas resource list and verify direct reports show and hide correctly.
Drag an employee from the resource list onto a project and verify the assignment creation flow opens with employee and project preselected.
Filter canvas resources by organization and verify only employees from the selected organization remain visible.
Edit an employee from the canvas modal and verify changes are reflected in both canvas and main matrix views.
Edit a project from the canvas modal and verify changes are reflected in both canvas and main matrix views.
Remove an assignment from the canvas and verify the assignment disappears from all dependent views.
Open project staffing details on the canvas and verify the weekly FTE chart renders expected data points.
Perform create, update, and delete flows across entities and verify dependent tables, charts, filters, and canvas views refresh consistently.
Create a hierarchy, reload the app, and verify employee type and manager relationships are preserved through the API and UI.
